channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Iran’s New Supreme Leader Was Wounded Early in the War, Iranian and Israeli Officials Say - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Iran’s New Supreme Leader Was Wounded Early in the War, Iranian and Israeli Officials Say  The New York Times
  2. Source: New Iranian supreme leader had fractured foot and face lacerations on first day of war  CNN
  3. How Iran Is Building a Religious Mythology Around Its New Supreme Leader  WSJ
  4. Mojtaba Khamenei was hurt in strike that killed his father, Iran’s Cyprus ambassador confirms  The Guardian
  5. The Iranian Regime Doubles Down  The Atlantic

item.title: Trump tells Axios there's "practically nothing left" to target in Iran - Axios
item.description:
1. Trump tells Axios there's "practically nothing left" to target in Iran  Axios

  5. Live Updates: Trump vows to end war soon as Iran hits ships, threatens banks, and toll on U.S. forces emerges  CBS News

item.title: Reducing Europe's nuclear energy sector was 'strategic mistake', EU chief says - Reuters
item.description:
1. Reducing Europe's nuclear energy sector was 'strategic mistake', EU chief says  Reuters
  2. Merz says Germany won't join EU return to nuclear energy  dw.com
  3. Today we are presenting a new European strategy for Small Modular Reactors. Our goal is simple. We want this new technology to be operational in Europe by the early 2030s. And to back this we will create a €200M guarantee, to support private investment i  x.com
  4. EU Made a ‘Mistake’ in Phasing Out Nuclear, Von Der Leyen Says  Bloomberg
  5. Brussels backs mini-nuclear power plants to secure low-carbon power  Euronews.com
